title: MacroMenu
description: A simple, customizable command menu that allows you to create command macros and (possibly in the future) key bindings
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/leNn3zfGXFI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The **MacroMenu** mod introduces a convenient, customizable menu accessible with a single button press. Within this menu, you can easily **create**, **edit**, and **delete** buttons, each assigned to any chat command you desire. Forget repeatedly typing long commands – simply click a button in the menu to instantly execute the desired action! Perfect for quickly using teleports, gamemodes, custom plugin commands, and much more.

_P.S. To be honest, this mod was created only because I couldn't find anything similar for Minecraft 1.20.1 **Forge**. Seriously, is that too much to ask? I digress...
Due to the desire to create the mod quickly, it is still raw, in the early stages of development, and the functionality is not very colorful, but it **does** perform its functions._

P.S.S. In the future, I plan to add more features:
1. Key bindings
2. Theme support
and something else, but I'm getting ahead of myself...
